## Checklist

- [ ] Tests pass.
- [ ] No secrets, private hostnames, private IPs, real paths, credentials, or real config contents are committed.
- [ ] Docs are updated when behavior, API, CLI, packaging, or operator workflows change.
- [ ] No tests perform live config writes, real restarts, SSH, or operations against real machines.
- [ ] Security-sensitive reports are routed through [SECURITY.md](../SECURITY.md), not public PR discussion.
